arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Serie A clash against Lazio. After resting during Thursday’s Coppa Italia defeat, key figures Romelu Lukaku, Stanislav Lobotka, and Khvicha Kvaratskhelia are expected to reclaim their spots in the starting lineup. This return likely means Giovanni Simeone will step aside, despite his impressive track record against Lazio. The Argentine striker, who netted in the midweek cup match, boasts an outstanding eight goals in 14 Serie A appearances against the Roman club – the highest tally among current players. arts.ttl: Napoli vs. Lazio, a big clash at the top
arts.sum: Napoli have scored an average of 2.8 goals in their last 12 home games against Lazio in Serie A (34 in total), winning eight of those games (D1 L3); however, they have lost the two most recent ones and have never suffered more than two consecutive home defeat against these opponents in the competition. Lazio are Giovanni Simeone`s favourite opposition in Serie A, thanks to eight goals in 14 matches: the Napoli striker is currently the player in the competition who has scored the most goals against the Biancocelesti.

arts.sum: Napoli will be looking to exact revenge over Lazio three days following the Coppa Italia elimination. The contest will take place at the Stadio Mardona in Naples. It kicks off on Sunday, 20:45 local time.
